1.description: Submit a new service request for a catalog item and start fulfilment. Takes the catalog_id and the collected form fields (keys MUST match the schema from get_service_request_fields; every required field present). Opens the Service Request, decomposes it into the fulfilment task DAG, and dispatches execution. Action-tier: only call after the user has confirmed the collected values.

parameters.name: catalog_id
parameters.description: The catalog item id being requested.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Collected form values keyed by field_name; keys must match the schema exactly.

parameters.name: requested_for
parameters.description: User the request is for (default: the caller).
